title: JCraft: VOFS
description: JCraft Voice Over For Stands - VOFS
body:
This resource pack made especially for JCraft: Eyes Of Ender mod and adds or replaces included in mod stand sounds to voice-overs mostly from ASBR and Anime

Currently resource pack replaces sounds of stand summon and some moveset for this Stands: Star Platinum/SPTW, The World/TWOH, Magician Red, Silver Chariot, The Hand, Gold Experience/GER, King Crimson, Metallica, Whitesnake, C-MOON, Made In Heaven, D4C.
